name: Lion
info: Lions are social cats living in prides. They are apex predators.

name: Tiger
info: Tigers are apex predators with iconic orange and black stripes.

name: Elephant
info: Elephants are the largest land animals, known for their intelligence and memory.

name: Panda
info: Giant pandas are known for their black-and-white coloring and bamboo diet.

name: Peacock
info: Peacocks are famous for their colorful tail feathers used in courtship displays.

name: Kangaroo
info: Kangaroos are marsupials that carry their young in pouches and are great jumpers.

name: Penguin
info: Penguins are flightless birds adapted to life in the water and cold climates.

name: Giraffe
info: Giraffes are the tallest land animals, known for their long necks and legs.

name: Zebra
info: Zebras are known for their black-and-white stripes and live in herds.

name: Dolphin
info: Dolphins are intelligent marine mammals known for their playful behavior.

name: Fox
info: Foxes are small to medium-sized omnivorous mammals with bushy tails.

name: Wolf
info: Wolves are social predators living in packs with strong family bonds.

name: Bear
info: Bears are large mammals known for strength and adaptability.

name: Owl
info: Owls are nocturnal birds of prey with excellent night vision.

name: Crocodile
info: Crocodiles are large aquatic reptiles known for powerful jaws.
